Open Every day, 6 a.m.–10 p.m.

Sale

Savings all week long…

  • Weekly Specials

    See what’s on sale this week to find all sorts of delicious deals at your local store!

  • Sign Up

    Great meals and amazing deals, including our exclusive Secret Special in your email!

Locations

Eighteen locations serving Northern California.

  • Your Home Store

    Nugget Markets Roseville, Blue Oaks

    1509 Blue Oaks Blvd. Roseville, CA.

    View all of our Nugget Markets, Fork Lift, Sonoma Market and Food 4 Less stores.

    A complete listing of what is on every aisle at every store

  • Events

    Come say hi to us at your community events.

Order

Order online, pick up in store!

  • Gourmet to Go

    Fresh, convenient catering platters

  • The Cake Store

    Click. Click. Cake!

  • Lunch Boxes

    Perfect pairings packed for a perfect picnic.

  • Signature Meals to Go

    A delicious dinner is as good as done!

  • Gift Cards

    Order online, ship where ever you like.

  • View our take-away menus

  • Sandwich Menu

    Specialty sandwiches available at all of our locations.

  • Coffee & Juice Bar Menu

    Coffee, juices, smoothies and açaí bowls from our coffee bar.

  • Family Pizza Menu

    Fresh-baked pizzas for the whole family offered at select locations.

Let’s Cook

Recipes, pairings, kitchen hacks and more…

  • Recipes

    Get cooking with hundreds of delicious recipes fit for any occasion.

  • The Daily Dish Blog

    Perfect pairings, kitchen hacks and other tantalizing trivia.

  • The Field Guide

    Your trusty companion for unlocking the wonders of Nugget Markets.

About

  • About

    Family owned and operated since 1926, Nugget Markets has been offering an extraordinary grocery experience since the very beginning.

  • Contests

    Over $22,000 in prizes given out this year!

  • Lifestyle Icons

    How to identify special products in our stores.

  • Fresh to Market

    Our house-brand focused on unique products developed with local producers.

  • Departments

    Learn about what makes our stores special

  • Sustainability

    Committed to working towards a greener, more sustainable future every day.

  • Community

    Supporting local non-profits and causes since 1926!

    Fresh to Market

    Premium Beef T‑Bone Steaks

    Top 1/3 USDA Choice. Raw.

    $16.99/lb.

    Save $3/lb.

    Grown in Guinda, California

    Organic Sweet 100, Sungold or Mixed Medley Cherry Tomatoes

    1 PT. basket

    Selected varieties

    $5.99

    Save $2

    St. Felicien

    Tentation Triple Cream

    $11.99/ea.

    Save $1.50/ea.

    Fresh to Market

    Variety Cookies

    12 CT. container

    $8.99

    Made from scratch and baked in-house. All-natural ingredients: no additives or preservatives. Featuring candy, chocolate chip, heath, oatmeal raisin, snickerdoodle, and sugar.

    Contains: eggs, milk, and wheat. May also contain: soy and/or tree nuts (almond).

  5. McConnell’s Fine Ice Cream

    1 PT. carton

    Selected varieties

    $6.99

    Save $4

    McConnell's Fine Ice Cream is truly a craft dessert that's been perfected over 70 years, using fresh ingredients to make the world a sweeter place.

    Zoe’s Bacon

    12 OZ. package

    Selected varieties

    $8.99

    Save $2.50

    This artisan bacon is chef-quality and restaurant worthy... but you can have it whenever you want in the comfort of your own home! Based in locally Petaluma, California, Zoe's is bringing you the best.

    Bonne Maman Fruit Preserves

    13 OZ. jar

    Selected varieties

    $4.99

    Save $4

    Bon appétit with Bonne Maman! The possibilities are endless with their authentic, sweet fruit spreads made with simple, premium ingredients and substantial pieces of fruit. Spread it on toast, use it in baking and more!

    Bonne Maman pone en tus manos infinitas posibilidades con sus exquisitas mermeladas de frutas y la deliciosa crema de limón. Sus tradicionales conservas están cuidadosamente preparadas con las mejores frutas frescas, capturando la dulce esencia y el vibrante sabor de cada ingrediente.

    Starkist Albacore Tuna in Water

    5 OZ. can

    Selected varieties

    4/$5

    Save up to $6.96 on 4

    Wraps, salads, sandwiches, and more—this awesome albacore tuna can do it all! Low in fat and high in protein and natural omega-3s, it’s perfect for adding some seafood deliciousness to your diet.

    El atún blanco o albacore es naturalmente bajo en grasas, alto en proteínas y rico en omega-3, lo que lo convierte en una excelente incorporación a su dieta.

    California Olive Ranch Global Blend Extra Virgin Olive Oil

    25.4 OZ. bottle

    $19.99

    Save $6

    This globally inspired gem is a celebration of high-quality extra virgin olive oil produced around the world to create the ideal taste profile.

  10. Kellogg’s Nutri Grain Breakfast Bars

    8 CT. package

    Selected varieties

    2/$6

    Save $3.98 on 2

    Made with whole grains and fantastic fruity flavor, these breakfast bars are a perfect way to start the day.

    Los cereales de Kellogg's ofrecen opciones clásicas y crujientes que constituyen un desayuno sabroso y equilibrado. Crujientes y sutilmente dulces.

  11. Buffalo Trace Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey

    750 ML. bottle

    $21.99

    Save $9

    Buffalo Trace Distillery has been making bourbon whiskey the same way for more than 200 years. Distilled, aged, and bottled at the most award-winning distillery in the world, it's made from the finest corn, rye, and barley malt for a rich, complex taste.

  1. Red Eye Smoothie

    Medium

    Contains: milk.

    Get your eye on the prize! Made with strawberries, banana, fresh apple juice and Greek yogurt, this sweet, tangy smoothie is cherished for a reason.

    $7
    Save $1

Kitchen Don’t show this department. ×

    Boar’s Head

    Maple Glazed Honey Coat Ham

    A sweet treat that is nutritious and delicious. This ham has 100% pure maple syrup and golden honey baked right in, making it a great choice for sandwiches and salads alike.

    $15.99/lb.
    Save $1/lb.

    Boar’s Head

    Salsalito Turkey

    Here is a boneless skinless turkey breast with a southwestern flair. Coated with a salsa of jalapeno peppers, onions, sun-dried tomatoes, cilantro and spices.

    $15.99/lb.
    Save $1/lb.

    Diestel

    Cajun Turkey

    A savory blend of herbs and spices give our roasted breast a delicate flavor. No gluten, casein, carrageen, phosphates, MSG, artificial ingredients, or preservatives. No added nitrates or nitrites. No antibiotics, growth stimulants, or hormones. Turkeys are fed a 100% Vegetarian Diet. Only whole muscle meat used. No fillers! Thoughtfully raised.

    $18.99/lb.
    Save $1/lb.

    Boar’s Head

    Bold® 3 Pepper Colby Jack® Cheese

    By adding a blend of Jalapeño, Chipotle and Habanero peppers to our award winning Colby Jack, this Boar’s Head cheese will make your taste buds notice.

    $12.49/lb.
    Save 50¢/lb.

    Fresh to Market

    Stuffed Portobellos

    Contains: milk.

    Our wonderful portobello mushrooms are stuffed with squash and other fresh veggies blended with mozzarella, feta, and Pecorino Romano.

    $12.99/lb.

    Fresh to Market

    Thai Sesame Quinoa Bowl

    Contains: sesame, soy, and wheat.

    Quinoa layered with shredded cabbage, sliced almonds, green onions, bell peppers, pickled carrots, cilantro and topped with Thai Sesame dressing.

    $8.99/ea.

    Fresh to Market

    Kid’s Lunchbox with Fruit & Yogurt

    Contains: eggs, milk, soy, and wheat.

    Your little one will love Boar's Head Ovengold Turkey and Vermont Cheddar wrapped in whole-wheat lavash with a side of strawberries, grapes, and honey vanilla Greek yogurt.

    $6.99/ea.

    Habanero Mango Shrimp Ceviche

    Contains: shellfish (shrimp).

    This scratch-made summertime favorite satisfies with shrimp, mango, pineapple, cucumber, onion, cilantro, habanero, and jalapeno.

    $14.99/lb.

    Vegetable Spring Roll

    Chef-Prepared

    $7.45/ea.
    Save $1/ea.

    Volcano Sushi Roll

    Chef-Prepared

    Contains: pollock, tuna, wheat, egg, soy, crab, and sesame.

    $10.95/ea.
    Save $1/ea.

    Fresh to Market

    El Matador

    Contains: eggs, milk, soy, and wheat.

    This guest favorite mounds a quarter pound of our famous steak sliced thinly on a freshly baked ciabatta roll slathered with our scratch‑made chipotle mayo and topped with gouda cheese, green chiles, roasted red peppers, red onions, and spring mix. Yum!

    $14.99/ea.

Prices and selection on this ad are for Nugget Markets Roseville, Blue Oaks only. All sale items are limited to 4 items per household through the sales effective dates unless otherwise noted. We reserve the right to limit individual purchases to four packages of any item for sale, except items where otherwise noted. Sale items are not available to any commercial dealer or wholesaler. Items are subject to stock on hand. All items not available at all stores. Photos & Illustrations are for display purposes only and do not necessarily depict items that are on sale. Cookie Preferences

This website uses essential cookies to save your home store and shopping basket. We also use analytics and advertising pixels to understand traffic and measure campaigns. You can accept or decline this non-essential tracking.
